text: Never provision this project's backend objects (tables, RPCs, edge functions) inside an existing/unrelated Supabase project, even prefixed and flagged reversible — the owner ruled the 'insurance' project strictly off-limits and required a full teardown on 2026-07-10. If no dedicated project slot exists, STOP and ask the owner (free a slot / upgrade); never fall back to a shared project. Any resource-scope decision outside this repo needs explicit owner approval BEFORE proceeding.
